EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is deleting objects {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is creating object {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is viewing information about objects {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create object {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change object {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to view information about objects {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is changing object {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete objects {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} viewed information about objects {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
